pokemon:passimian.name: Passimian
pokemon:passimian.summary: They battle with hard berries for weapons. Their techniques are passed from the boss to the group, generation upon generation.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: They battle with hard berries for weapons. Their techniques are passed from the boss to the group, generation upon generation.
Passimian live in groups of about 20, with each member performing an assigned role. Through cooperation, the group survives.
They form groups of roughly 20 individuals. Their mutual bond is remarkable—they will never let down a comrade.
Displaying amazing teamwork, they follow the orders of their boss as they all help out in the search for their favorite berries.
Berries are its weapons as well as the staple of its diet. The one that can throw a berry the farthest is the boss of the troop.
They use their saliva to stick leaves to their shoulders. You can tell what troop they belong to from the position of the leaves.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: They battle with hard berries for weapons. Their techniques are passed from the boss to the group, generation upon generation.
